name: Dog Fest Calcium Bones With Chicken 55G
description: We specifically made smaller bones for smaller dogs. Enriched with calcium, covered with chicken fillet strips, this great tasting treat supports healthy teeth and bones. Composition: chicken, calcium bone, vegetable by-products, minerals. Analytical constituents, %: crude protein 24, crude fat 2.5, crude fiber 0.2, crude ash 4, moisture 18.
